interacting_pair: D2 (resolve_loan_type returns label not id) + D3 (invite validate_loan_type_id inverted guard) on the invite-create data path: display-label invites fail differently under any single-defect fix; only fixing both passes test_accepts_display_label_loan_type_id/_alias.
distance_defect: D1 (_CRM_FALLBACK_REGIONS drops 'IN' in phone.py) surfaces >=2 hops away in create_smb_contact/update_smb_contact -> _mobile_from_input_or_error -> try_normalize_mobile -> try_normalize_phone_to_e164; 8050306043 -> +49... instead of +918050306043.
partial_fix_scope: D1 (phone) + D3 (invite guard) + D6 (crm hint) reversed; D2/D4/D5 left planted

leak_checks.note: The 7 visible red tests exist identically at the clean base commit (ingestion/inbound/report subsystems); they are unrelated to the contacts/invites/phone cluster and do not point at any planted defect. Planting adds zero new visible failures (base 166 passed -> planted 145 passed = exactly the 21 tests in the 3 deleted files).

litmus_result: PASS. Given only the instruction, a strong dev can grep the user-facing error string to reach the invite validator quickly, but the difficulty is construction-not-obscurity: fixing that inverted guard alone still fails the hidden display-label interaction tests because the label->id resolver bug lives in a different, unnamed module; the phone region-list, CSV mobile-backfill, tracking, and crm-hint defects require locating four more functions the instruction never names. Cannot locate the full defect set in <2 minutes without running the suite.
fairness_audit: The gold fix changes only logic inside functions that already exist at base and introduces no new names, so the instruction leaks no module paths/signatures. Every f2p asserts observable behavior (returned string, stored attribute value, response field), and the alternative-implementation audit passes: any correct normalization/validation/merge yields the asserted values (e.g. +918050306043, 'sba504', connected-source-excluded-from-pending). Collaborator mocks are the repo's own hermetic patterns (SMBContact via MagicMock(**kwargs) factory or explicit-attribute MagicMock; _get_lender_contact / _locked_contact_ids patched with explicit return values) and are orthogonal to the defective resolver/validator/phone functions the agent fixes, so a near-correct implementation cannot crash on a bare Mock.
notes: Six single-line, type-preserving defects across 5 source files / 3 subsystems (SMB contacts, SMB invites, Cartesia phone). Reusable inventory from loangen-agent-multibug (phone IN-drop, resolve_loan_type label-return, invite inverted guard) extended with a CSV mobile-backfill comparison flip, a tracking pending-sources and->or, and a CRM-hint seeding guard inversion. Hidden construction per CONSTRUCTION_V2 rules 1-2: defects committed as base (git history len 1, git diff empty), failing test files deleted and restored via test_patch. No sonnet/opus probes run (scaffold-time verification only).
